mapper.sql: select id, third_party_pk, customer, sheet_je, dh, supno, sup, ckno, ck, ksbh, ksmc, bz, jsfs, receive_channel, scm_sup_code, scm_hospital_code, scm_hospital_id, scm_supplier_id, zjly, create_time, hospital_id, supplier_id, null as hospital_code, null as hospital_name, null as supplier_code, null as supplier_name from zs_tp_order

select z.id, z.third_party_pk, z.customer, z.sheet_je, z.dh, z.supno, z.sup, z.ckno, z.ck, z.ksbh, z.ksmc, z.bz, z.jsfs, z.receive_channel, z.scm_sup_code, z.scm_hospital_code, z.scm_hospital_id, z.scm_supplier_id, z.zjly, z.create_time, z.hospital_id, z.supplier_id, null as hospital_code, null as hospital_name, null as supplier_code, null as supplier_name from zs_tp_order z

z.id, z.third_party_pk, z.customer, z.sheet_je, z.dh, z.supno, z.sup, z.ckno, z.ck, z.ksbh, z.ksmc, z.bz, z.jsfs, z.receive_channel, z.scm_sup_code, z.scm_hospital_code, z.scm_hospital_id, z.scm_supplier_id, z.zjly, z.create_time, z.hospital_id, z.supplier_id, COALESCE(nullif(trim(h.hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(z.scm_hospital_code), '')) as hospital_code, h.hospital_name, COALESCE(nullif(trim(s.supplier_code), ''), nullif(trim(z.scm_sup_code), '')) as supplier_code, COALESCE(nullif(trim(s.company_name), ''), nullif(trim(z.sup), '')) as supplier_name
from zs_tp_order z left join scm_hospital h on z.hospital_id = h.hospital_id left join scm_supplier s on z.supplier_id = s.supplier_id

if.test: params != null and params.excludeHospitalIds != null and params.excludeHospitalIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.roleSupplierIds != null and params.roleSupplierIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.scopePairBlock != null and (params.scopePairBlock == true or params.scopePairBlock == 'true')
params != null and params.scopePairs != null and params.scopePairs.size() > 0

mapper.select:
select
z.del_flag = '0'
and z.dh like concat('%', #{dh}, '%')
and z.customer like concat('%', #{customer}, '%')
and z.ksmc like concat('%', #{ksmc}, '%')
and h.hospital_name like concat('%', #{hospitalName}, '%')
and s.company_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
and not exists ( select 1 from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') inner join zs_tp_order_detail l on l.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' )
and exists ( select 1 from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') inner join zs_tp_order_detail l on l.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' ) and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and ( select coalesce(sum(dd.delivery_quantity), 0) from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id ) < ifnull(l.sl, 0) )
and not exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and l.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and ( select coalesce(sum(dd.delivery_quantity), 0) from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id ) < ifnull(l.sl, 0) ) and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l2 where l2.order_id = z.id and l2.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(l2.sl, 0) > 0 )
order by z.create_time desc

select
z.del_flag = '0'
and z.dh like concat('%', #{dh}, '%')
and z.customer like concat('%', #{customer}, '%')
and z.ksmc like concat('%', #{ksmc}, '%')
and h.hospital_name like concat('%', #{hospitalName}, '%')
and s.company_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
order by z.create_time desc

select id, order_id, third_party_pk, dh, code, name, gg, dw, bzl, sccj, zcz, phflag, sl, dj, je, jm, cgj, bz, bz1, bz2, dsb from zs_tp_order_detail where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' order by create_time
